description: Supported server OpenAPI contract window for SDK request-compatibility. Each file is agentex/openapi.yaml from scaleapi/scale-agentex at the pinned sha. Advance 'min-supported' as the oldest deployed server moves forward, then run refresh_specs.py.

specs.label: min-supported
specs.note: pre-#278; oldest contract still in the field. UpdateStateRequest requires task_id/agent_id in the body — the contract the 0.13.0 client broke.
